name: SENTINEL Security Auditing
description: SENTINEL is an AI-powered contextual security auditing platform. It thinks like a red team operator — static analysis, taint flow tracing, attack graph generation, exploit chain narratives, and hardening checklists. Works across Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, VS Code, JetBrains, and any MCP-compatible runtime.
author: Wembie
